query:
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN currentStage IN ('New Booking','Not on Topdog','Query','Reimb Docs Missing','Urgent/Reimb','T/O Package','DP','Holding Accounts') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS current_query_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN currentStage IN ('New Booking','Creating own PTS file','Not on Topdog','Query','Reimb Docs Missing','Urgent/Reimb','T/O Package','DP','Holding Accounts') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS with_creating_own_pts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN currentStage NOT IN ('Added to PTS','Commission Claimable','Commission Claimed','Cancelled') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS not_yet_added
FROM bookings;
